description: This map displays orthophotographic imagery of a mixed urban and rural landscape. The image features a prominent residential area characterised by numerous detached houses and an intricate network of roads, central to the image. To the north and west, the residential zone transitions into dense forest cover, while an extensive agricultural field with distinct parallel plough lines occupies the bottom-left quadrant. Several specific areas are highlighted with yellow outlines: a sports complex with tennis courts and a green field in the top-centre, a large institutional building complex on the western edge, two individual residential plots in the central-right, a commercial or industrial building with an adjacent car park in the mid-right, and an elongated undeveloped parcel of land in the bottom-right. The map includes a north arrow (N) in the top-left corner and a scale bar in the bottom-left indicating 200 m.
